sms.template:
Dear <#ARG1>, 

We regret to inform you that your personal data associated with Consent ID: <#ARG2> and maintained by <#ARG3> was involved in a data breach identified on <#ARG4>. 

Details of the Incident: 
• Breach Reference ID: <#ARG5> 
• Affected Data Category: <#ARG6> 
• Reported By: <#ARG7> 
• Reported To Authority On: <#ARG8> 

Recommended Actions: 
1) Change your account password and review linked accounts. 
2) Monitor your transactions for unusual activity. 
3) Contact our Data Protection Office for any help. 

DPO Contact: <#ARG9>, <#ARG10> 

We apologize for the inconvenience and assure you that necessary steps are being taken. 

Regards, Jio Consent Management System

sms.template:
Dear <#ARG1>,

Welcome to the Jio Consent Management System (JCMS).

To enhance security, please set up Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) using Google Authenticator:

1) Open or install Google Authenticator.
2) Tap "+" → select "Enter setup key".
3) Enter the following:
 • Account: PAN <#ARG2> | Client ID <#ARG6>
 • Key: <#ARG3>

Use the 6-digit code generated in the portal to log in securely.
You can access JCMS using the following URL: <#ARG5>

Need help? Contact ${SYSTEM_EMAIL_REPLYTO:support-consent@ril.com}

Regards,
Jio Consent Management System

email.subject: Two-Factor Authentication Setup for JCMS
email.completeHtmlContent:
Dear <#ARG1>,

Welcome to the Jio Consent Management System (JCMS).

To enhance security, please set up Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) using Google Authenticator or any compatible authenticator app.

Important: If the QR code is not visible, please trust the sender / mark the email as safe and reload the message.

  1. Open or install an authenticator app (e.g., Google Authenticator, Authy, Microsoft Authenticator).
  2. Tap '+' → select 'Scan a QR code'.
  3. Scan the QR code below to set up 2FA.

If QR scan fails, use the steps below:

  1. Tap '+' → select 'Enter setup key'.
  2. Enter the following:
    → Account: PAN <#ARG2> | Client ID <#ARG6>
    → Key: <#ARG3>

Use the 6-digit code generated in the portal to log in securely.

You can access JCMS using the following URL: <#ARG5>

Need help? Contact ${SYSTEM_EMAIL_REPLYTO:support-consent@ril.com}.

Regards,
Jio Consent Management System
